headerTitle: Forward Deployment Engineer  ·  AI-Native Enterprise SaaS  ·  Agentic Frameworks  ·  Customer Embed
subjectText: Forward Deployment Engineer — Cornerstone OnDemand (Remote) · $107K–$172K — Will Austin
intro: Cornerstone is looking for a Forward Deployed Engineer to bridge product engineering and strategic enterprise customers with AI-powered Workforce Agility products. Four complete external FDE engagements, 14 live AI endpoints — that is the direct equivalent of the experience bar.
bullets: Forward deployment pattern — four complete external engagements from embed to handoff: solution architecture, AI-native implementation with Generative AI and Agentic Frameworks, adoption drive, documented handoff. Four for four, zero missed scopes.

Generative AI + Agentic Frameworks in production — 14 live endpoints, multi-model routing (Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus + GPT-4o), MCP protocol, tool use, HITL confirm-before-execute, Zod-validated structured output contracts. This is the production agentic stack Cornerstone is deploying — not a proof of concept, not a sandbox.

Enterprise stakeholder fluency and adoption planning — former GM running P&L and 40–80 staff across Dallas and Las Vegas properties, translated complex AI systems to non-technical operators under live operational pressure across four deployments. IT, business, and executive stakeholders in the same conversation. Every engagement closed with a system the client ran without technical support.
closingLine: The FDE profile Cornerstone is hiring for — production Generative AI deployment, agentic framework integration, solution architecture, and adoption planning with non-technical enterprise stakeholders — is the current operating model. Available immediately, US-eligible.
matchNotes: Direct FDE title, only 1+ year experience required — most accessible bar in the pipeline. Generative AI + Agentic Frameworks = exact production stack. Enterprise deployment + adoption pattern = direct match. Hybrid US = workable.
